title: British Midland Virtual Website Now Live
summary: The official British Midland Virtual website is now live.
content: After months of planning and development, we are delighted to launch the official British Midland Virtual website.
The website showcases our growing route network, fleet and future plans for the airline.
This is only the beginning, with many exciting features including a Pilot Portal, downloads and operations centre planned for future updates.
author: British Midland Crew Services

title: Paris Charles de Gaulle Joins the Network
summary: British Midland Virtual continues its expansion with the addition of Paris CDG.
content: We're delighted to announce the addition of Paris Charles de Gaulle to our growing European network.
author: Network Planning
